response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The audio perfectly matches the scraped lyrics in the Reference JSON for both 'Yokkyu ni Michita Seinendan' and 'Kagami'.
2. JSON Usage: The Reference JSON was fully utilized for lyric transcription, translation, and section boundaries.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are highly customized to the vocal bursts, employing seamless transitions with zero cascading delays. Vocalizations (ad-libs/greetings) have also been tightly synchronized.

subtitles.original: 一度はあの光を見たんだよ とてもキレイで
subtitles.english: I once saw that light, it was so beautiful.

subtitles.original: でも今思えば汚かった あれはいわゆるBad Day Dreams
subtitles.english: But thinking about it now, it was dirty, it was what they call Bad Day Dreams.

subtitles.original: 光が眩し過ぎて周りが見えず ただただ日々を
subtitles.english: The light was too dazzling, I couldn't see my surroundings, just wasting my days...

subtitles.original: 棒に振ってたあの日 今だから笑えるよ
subtitles.english: Those days, I can laugh about them now.

subtitles.original: 一度はあの幕を開けたんだよ とても重くて
subtitles.english: I once opened that curtain, it was so heavy.

subtitles.original: プレッシャー、イヤ味それに勝つために ただ嫌なヤツで
subtitles.english: Just to win against the pressure and snide remarks, I was just a nasty person.

subtitles.original: そして気が付くと真っ暗な部屋に 一人ぼっちだった
subtitles.english: And when I noticed, I was all alone in a pitch-black room.

subtitles.original: 終わった... もう戻れない... なんて... 歩くのも止めた...
subtitles.english: It's over... I can't go back... or so I thought... I even stopped walking...

subtitles.original: でもI'm not alone. I'm not alone
subtitles.english: But I'm not alone. I'm not alone.

subtitles.original: We're not, We're not, We're not alone
subtitles.english: We're not, we're not, we're not alone.

subtitles.original: お金じゃ買えないもの手に入れて
subtitles.english: I got something money can't buy,

subtitles.original: もう一度光浴びて そして今度は騙されぬように
subtitles.english: bathed in the light once more, and this time, so I won't be deceived,

subtitles.original: 僕らは今目指すよ 欲望に満ちた青年団
subtitles.english: we are aiming now, the youth group filled with desire.

subtitles.original: 誰かが言った言葉 それすらその時は流して
subtitles.english: The words someone said, I just let them pass at the time.

subtitles.original: 今になって気付いたよ 欲望に負けた少年団
subtitles.english: Now I've realized, the youth group that lost to desire.

subtitles.original: So, I know you know, You know, I know
subtitles.english: So, I know you know, You know, I know.

subtitles.original: We have, we have, we have along
subtitles.english: We have, we have, we have along.

subtitles.original: 囚われないように遠く向いて
subtitles.english: Facing far away so I won't be trapped,

subtitles.original: 歩く
subtitles.english: I walk.

subtitles.original: もう一度光浴びて そして今度は騙されぬように
subtitles.english: Bathed in the light once more, and this time, so I won't be deceived,

subtitles.original: 僕らは今目指すよ 欲望に満ちた青年団
subtitles.english: we are aiming now, the youth group filled with desire.

subtitles.original: 誰かが言った言葉 それすらその時は流して
subtitles.english: The words someone said, I just let them pass at the time.

subtitles.original: 今になって気付いたよ 欲望に負けた少年団
subtitles.english: Now I've realized, the youth group that lost to desire.

subtitles.original: Hey...
subtitles.english: Hey...

subtitles.original: Oh... Oh...
subtitles.english: Oh... Oh...

subtitles.original: ありがとうございました
subtitles.english: Thank you very much.

subtitles.original: んー、おはよ
subtitles.english: Mmm, good morning.

subtitles.original: 朝起きてまず確認 きょうもいい感じだね
subtitles.english: Wake up in the morning and check first, looking good today too.

subtitles.original: 一年365日 わたしのこと一番みてるひと
subtitles.english: 365 days a year, the one who looks at me the most.

subtitles.original: 好きですと言えるのは 当たり前とかじゃない
subtitles.english: Being able to say "I like you", it's not a matter of course.
86,400 seconds a day...

subtitles.original: ずっと付き合ってくんだから
subtitles.english: Because we're always going to be together.

subtitles.original: ママから聞いたことあるわ
subtitles.english: I've heard from my mom before...

subtitles.original: 似た人を好きになるんじゃなくて
subtitles.english: It's not that you fall in love with someone similar.

subtitles.original: 好きな人には似るものらしいです 本当です
subtitles.english: It seems you start to resemble the one you love, it's true.

subtitles.original: みんな思ったことあるわ
subtitles.english: Everyone has thought about it before.

subtitles.original: 目を開けたら違う自分になって
subtitles.english: Opening your eyes and becoming a different self...

subtitles.original: いやいやもっと真剣に変身
subtitles.english: No, no, transform more seriously!
